title: Make optimizer score editing line-based instead of exact-substring based

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Starting implementation. Plan: add a line-range replace_lines command to ScoreEditorToolset, update optimizer prompts/recovery to use view + replace_lines + submit, and fix stale cycle/stage messaging so blocked status is only written on true blocked outcomes.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implementation complete locally. Added ScoreEditorToolset.replace_lines, updated optimizer prompting/recovery to use view + replace_lines + submit, added live stage-status updates for editing/smoke-test/evaluation phases, and added focused regression tests. Targeted pytest is green (16 passed). Moving to operational validation by restarting the affected optimizer runs.
